$schema_note: Source of truth for the Brand Steward workflow. Read-only data. Edits here change what the workflow is allowed to detect/propose/protect. Confirm hex values against scripts/audit-bsa-brand.sh output before relying on them.
principle: Automated where deterministic. Gated where judgment, rendered UI, shared CSS, or irreversible repo changes are involved.
automated_stages: 9. produce a proposed unified diff (written to reports/, source untouched)
11. run screenshot QA where data-* pages are in scope
human_gates: 1. before applying a proposed diff to source files
3. before touching high-risk zones or any data-* injected page

drift_values_to_canonicalize.comment: Same INTENT (brand orange/gold) but non-canonical hex. Propose -> var(--color-brand). Always human-reviewed; some may be intentional in a specific context.

keep_as_brand_accent.comment: BSA's child-brand color IS orange/yellow. Never neutralize it. Only canonicalize the hex; keep the orange.

semantic_state_colors_protect.comment: These encode MEANING, not brand. Never touch. Confirm exact hexes per repo via the detector's semantic section.

auto_injection_signals.comment: Pages rendering UI from data-* require SCREENSHOT QA before any edit; grep undercounts their UI.

never_touch.comment: No script/agent edits without a dedicated, approved scoped report.

human_frozen_pages.scope: the entire directory and every file under it: any HTML, CSS, JS, JSON, MD, SVG/assets, or page-specific files used only by this deep dive
human_frozen_pages.reason: Foundational Layer Thesis deep dive frozen by human owner
human_frozen_pages.status: excluded by human freeze; requires dedicated approval; no action
rules: do not canonicalize orange/gold values inside it
do not touch its copy, layout, links, scripts, metadata, JSON-LD, or styling
do not include it in any deep-dives/ batch
unfreeze only via an explicit, human-approved dedicated scoped report for this page

transforms.comment: Detection, scoping, patch-generation, and verification run automatically. APPLYING a patch is gated. Pipeline auto-refuses to apply on shared CSS, high-risk zones, or data-* pages regardless of flags.

add_canonical_link.intent: Add <link rel=stylesheet href=/css/brand.css> (absolute path) before </head> on pages missing a canonical token source.
add_canonical_link.eligible: static pages not in high_risk_dirs and not data-injected

canonicalize_orange.intent: Replace drift hex with var(--color-brand). Keep orange; never neutralize.
canonicalize_orange.eligible: vetted pages, per-line review in the Scoper report

portability.comment: Reuse for FSA by swapping the color ruleset.

FSA.issue: broad dark-green surfaces -> neutral tokens via :root bridge (NOT canonicalize)
